source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/01_DHF/05_HnX-P1, HnX-PB/03_설계개발 출력/10_User manual/[HnX-P1] User Manual(EU) (A-IFU-HNX-EU, Rev 0.5, 260429).pdf

document.title: User Manual (HnX-P1) Portable X-ray System
document.revisionOrVersion: Rev. No. 0.5; Doc No: A-IFU-HNX(EU), Rev No: 0.4

sourceSummary.oneLine: User manual for the HnX-P1 battery-powered portable X-ray system covering intended use, safety, regulatory standards, operation, maintenance, and product information.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Provided to the user with the HnX-P1 and intended to describe precautions, possible risks, operation, service information, and safe use of the device.
keyPoints: The HnX-P1 is a battery-powered portable X-ray system intended for generating radiographic images of human anatomy.
The device is intended for use in professional healthcare facilities, such as hospitals, clinics, and emergency departments.
The device emits ionizing radiation and is restricted to qualified healthcare professionals or trained service personnel.
The device is not intended for pediatric use, fluoroscopic use, mammography, dental radiography, or therapy.
The manual lists IEC, EN, FCC, FDA guidance, and 21 CFR requirements used for safety, EMC, radio, software, usability, and X-ray performance.

concepts.name: Intended purpose
concepts.evidence: The HnX-P1 is a battery-powered portable X-ray system intended for generating radiographic images of human anatomy.

concepts.name: Indications for use
concepts.evidence: The device is indicated for the diagnostic imaging of the following clinical conditions: Traumatic and Orthopedic Conditions; Respiratory and Thoracic Conditions; Abdominal Conditions.

concepts.name: Contra-indications
concepts.evidence: Pregnancy... Bariatric Patients... Mammography: This device is not to be used for mammography.

concepts.name: Target population
concepts.evidence: Age: Adult patients. Patient State: No specific limitations apply except for pregnant women, for whom use must be clinically justified by a physician.

concepts.name: Intended use environment
concepts.evidence: The HnX-P1 is intended for use in professional healthcare facilities, such as hospitals, clinics, and emergency departments.

concepts.name: Radiation safety
concepts.evidence: This device emits ionizing radiation during normal use.

concepts.name: Restricted use and access control
concepts.evidence: This device is intended for use only by qualified healthcare professionals or trained service personnel.

concepts.name: EMC compliance
concepts.evidence: HnX-P1 conforms to this IEC60601-1-2:2020 standard for both immunity and emissions.

concepts.name: Product lifetime
concepts.evidence: The estimated product lifetime is up to 7 years under appropriate regular inspection and maintenance.

concepts.name: Preventive inspection and maintenance
concepts.evidence: The following inspection and maintenance for the unit shall be performed once every year, and handled by a service person only.

evidence.claim: The HnX-P1 is a battery-powered portable X-ray system.
evidence.evidenceText: This product is a battery-powered portable X-ray system designed and manufactured by H&abyz.

evidence.claim: The HnX-P1 is intended for generating radiographic images of human anatomy.
evidence.evidenceText: The HnX-P1 is a battery-powered portable X-ray system intended for generating radiographic images of human anatomy.

evidence.claim: The device is indicated for traumatic and orthopedic, respiratory and thoracic, and abdominal diagnostic imaging conditions.
evidence.evidenceText: The device is indicated for the diagnostic imaging of the following clinical conditions: Traumatic and Orthopedic Conditions... Respiratory and Thoracic Conditions... Abdominal Conditions.

evidence.claim: The device is contraindicated for abdominal and pelvic use in pregnant or possibly pregnant women.
evidence.evidenceText: Pregnancy: The device is contraindicated for use in the abdominal and pelvic regions of women who are pregnant or may be pregnant.

evidence.claim: The device is not to be used for mammography.
evidence.evidenceText: Mammography: This device is not to be used for mammography.

evidence.claim: The device is not intended for pediatric use.
evidence.evidenceText: The device is not intended for use in the Pediatric population, which includes Children (patients aged 2 years and above) and Infants (patients under 2 years old).

evidence.claim: The device is intended for professional healthcare facilities and indoor controlled environments.
evidence.evidenceText: The HnX-P1 is intended for use in professional healthcare facilities, such as hospitals, clinics, and emergency departments. The device is limited to indoor operation within controlled environments where radiation safety protocols and distance requirements are maintained.

evidence.claim: The HnX-P1 emits ionizing radiation during normal use.
evidence.evidenceText: This device emits ionizing radiation during normal use.

evidence.claim: The HnX-P1 is restricted to qualified healthcare professionals or trained service personnel.
evidence.evidenceText: This device is intended for use only by qualified healthcare professionals or trained service personnel.

evidence.claim: The HnX-P1 is designed for radiographic use only and not for fluoroscopic use.
evidence.evidenceText: The HnX-P1 is designed for radiographic uses only and not intended for fluoroscopic use or other associated applications.

evidence.claim: The device does not apply to mammography and dental radiography.
evidence.evidenceText: The device does not apply to mammography and dental radiography.

evidence.claim: The HnX-P1 is not intended for therapy.
evidence.evidenceText: The HnX-P1 should be used for the diagnosis purpose and is not intended for therapy of any kind.

evidence.claim: The HnX-P1 is Class I and IPX0 equipment under EN 60601-1 standards.
evidence.evidenceText: The HnX-P1 is specified as Class I and IPX0 equipment under EN 60601-1 standards.

evidence.claim: The HnX-P1 conforms to IEC60601-1-2:2020 for immunity and emissions.
evidence.evidenceText: HnX-P1 conforms to this IEC60601-1-2:2020 standard for both immunity and emissions.

evidence.claim: The maximum X-ray generator output is 720 W.
evidence.evidenceText: The maximum output of X-ray generator is 720W

evidence.claim: The X-ray tube output voltage range is 50 to 90 kV.
evidence.evidenceText: The X-ray Tube output voltage of generator is 50~90kV

evidence.claim: The software/firmware is HnX_P1 version 00.13.
evidence.evidenceText: Software(Firmware): HnX_P1 Version: 00.13

evidence.claim: The BLE module is BoT-nLE521 operating over 2,402 to 2,480 MHz.
evidence.evidenceText: Bluetooth (BLE) Module BoT-nLE521 Standard Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) Frequency Range 2,402 – 2,480 MHz

evidence.claim: The product lifetime is estimated up to 7 years under appropriate regular inspection and maintenance.
evidence.evidenceText: The estimated product lifetime is up to 7 years under appropriate regular inspection and maintenance.

evidence.claim: Annual preventive inspection and maintenance are required and handled by a service person only.
evidence.evidenceText: The following inspection and maintenance for the unit shall be performed once every year, and handled by a service person only.

reviewFlags.reason: Revision metadata conflicts: page headers state Rev. No. 0.5 while repeated document number lines state Rev No: 0.4.

Authority or jurisdiction is ambiguous: source path indicates EU and the text includes CE/European Authorized Representative references, but the regulatory section also cites FDA guidance, 21 CFR, and FCC requirements.
No explicit approval, clearance, certificate, declaration of conformity, notified body, or regulatory status number is provided for the HnX-P1 in the source text.
OCR or source text quality issues are present, including typographical errors and table artifacts such as 'KULL', 'enen', and inconsistent table numbering.
